question: Opening Hook: Create hype for the launch happening TOMORROW (Jan 29).
text: Guys, set your alarms. TOMORROW night, January 29th at 10 PM, we are dropping the most important piece of the year. This is The Monsters 10th Anniversary 400% MEGA. It is the culmination of a decade of art, all in one figure.

question: Describe the unique 'Stone Paint' texture on the ABS material.
hint: Stone Paint / ABS / Texture / Not Smooth
text: Don't expect smooth, shiny plastic. This is made of ABS but finished with a special 'Stone Paint' texture. It feels gritty, premium, and substantial—like a real sculpture. It transforms the figure into a 3D canvas.

question: Justify the $315 price tag using the 'Full Coverage' technique.
text: Why is this a high-ticket item? It's the technology. They used a full-coverage water transfer process to wrap Kasing Lung's sketches seamlessly around the 3D body. There are no awkward gaps. It's a technical marvel to get flat art onto a 3D form this perfectly.

question: Explain the articulation limitations positively.
text: Quick heads-up for collectors: The head rotates so you can display different expressions, but the arms are fixed. This is intentional. It preserves the flow of the artwork across the body so the painting doesn't get broken or misaligned.

question: Close the sale by connecting to the fan's memory of the last 10 years.
text: Look closely at the sketches on his belly and ears. These are the stories of the past 10 years. If you've loved Labubu since the beginning, this isn't just a toy. It's a biography. It's a tribute to the decade of warmth they gave us.
